addressedFeedback.summary: Session rerun validation, package skill projection, and progress/gate command lists.
Swift session rerun/resume CLI, file-backed session store, resumeSessionId runner support, gate evidence honesty fix.

residualRisks: Built-in add-on nodes validate known contracts but Swift runtime execution remains unavailable by design.
GraphQL remote session transport and SQLite runtime DB session indexing remain TypeScript-only.
This plan covers the accepted v0.1.17 additive parity slice only; broader swift-native-migration tasks may remain outside this slice.

TASK-001.summary: Swift WorkflowPackageSkillInstall and TypeScript dependency projected-vendor filtering parity

TASK-002.summary: TypeScriptBuiltinAddonRegistry validate/inspect executable preflight for known riela/* add-ons

TASK-003.summary: WorkflowSessionEntryValidation and deterministic runner rerunFromSessionId/rerunFromStepId with step-oriented messages

TASK-004.summary: Swift session rerun/resume CLI with file-backed session store, --scope user/project resolution, and nested-superviser rerun rejection

verificationCommands: bun test packages/riela/src/workflow/packages/packages.test.ts -t "checkout limits dependency skill projections"
